nasb.text: Then the south side was from the edge of Kiriath-jearim, and the border went westward and went to the fountain of the waters of Nephtoah.

esv.text: And the southern side begins at the outskirts of Kiriath-jearim. And the boundary goes from there to Ephron,  to the spring of the waters of Nephtoah.

cnv.text: 南方的疆界是從基列．耶琳的邊緣起，向西伸展，去到尼弗多亞的水泉；

ccb.text: 南部边界从基列·耶琳的边界开始向西直到尼弗多亚的水泉，
